surface.name: Experience Platform API auth tutorial + cURL XDM classes credential test
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation presents this as the hosted path from account setup to Test access credentials. It reaches the requested first-success boundary without extending into post-success production work.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create or sign in to an Adobe Developer Console project for Experience Platform, obtain API credentials, and complete the documented XDM classes credential test.
assumed_prior_state: The developer has no prior Adobe Experience Platform setup for this journey.
The journey starts at account creation and stops at the first documented successful outcome.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Test access credentials against global XDM classes
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: An authenticated cURL request to the global XDM classes endpoint returns a successful response.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The XDM classes request returns HTTP 200 and a JSON response instead of an authentication error.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The official documentation leads the developer to: Test access credentials.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable happy-path result on the selected Experience Platform API auth tutorial + cURL XDM classes credential test surface; later configuration and production hardening occur after success.

prerequisites.requirement: An Adobe Developer Console account with access to an Experience Platform organization.
Experience Platform API credentials, including API key, organization ID, access token, and sandbox name.

primary_path.action: Sign in to Adobe Developer Console and select the Experience Platform organization.
primary_path.input: A new developer starting at account creation
primary_path.output: The organization and an API project are accessible.
primary_path.success_signal: The organization and an API project are accessible.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Create or open an Experience Platform API project and obtain the required credential values.
primary_path.output: API key, organization ID, access token, and sandbox name are available.
primary_path.success_signal: API key, organization ID, access token, and sandbox name are available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Set shell variables for the documented Experience Platform authentication headers.
primary_path.output: The terminal contains the credential values required by the API request.
primary_path.success_signal: The terminal contains the credential values required by the API request.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Send the documented cURL credential test to the global XDM classes endpoint.
primary_path.output: The endpoint returns HTTP 200 with XDM classes JSON.
primary_path.success_signal: The endpoint returns HTTP 200 with XDM classes JSON.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Inspect the response and confirm that XDM classes were returned.
primary_path.output: A successful authenticated XDM classes response is visible.
primary_path.success_signal: A successful authenticated XDM classes response is visible.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

friction_gates.description: The Adobe organization must be entitled to Experience Platform and the user must be able to create or use API credentials.
Access tokens expire and must be current when the cURL request is sent.

sources.title: Test access credentials
evidence_supported: An authenticated cURL request to the global XDM classes endpoint returns a successful response.
The XDM classes request returns HTTP 200 and a JSON response instead of an authentication error.

uncertainties.question: Does the current fresh-account UI exactly match every navigation label in the documented Test access credentials path?
uncertainties.impact: Navigation wording may differ while the required outcome and boundary remain the same.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The official documentation establishes the journey but account-specific UI state can vary.
